allow: Bash(python -m py_compile app/main.py scoring_engine/engine.py scoring_engine/modules.py config.py)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8501 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Stopped")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $proc = Get-Process -Name "streamlit" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { "Streamlit is running \(PID: $\($proc.Id\)\)" } else { "Streamlit not running" })

PowerShell($proc = Get-Process -Name "streamlit" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { "Streamlit running - PID\(s\): $\(\($proc.Id\) -join ', '\)" } else { "Not running - restarting..."; Start-Process -FilePath "e:\\Vessel_Rating_System - Copy\\.venv\\Scripts\\streamlit.exe" -ArgumentList "run", "e:\\Vessel_Rating_System - Copy\\app\\main.py" -WorkingDirectory "e:\\Vessel_Rating_System - Copy" -NoNewWindow -PassThru })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $proc = Get-Process -Name "streamlit" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { "Streamlit running - PID: $\($proc.Id\)" } else { "Not running" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "streamlit" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath "e:\\Vessel_Rating_System - Copy\\.venv\\Scripts\\streamlit.exe" -ArgumentList "run", "app/main.py" -WorkingDirectory "e:\\Vessel_Rating_System - Copy" -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $p = Get-Process -Name "streamlit" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Running OK - PID $\($p.Id\)" } else { "Failed to start" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "streamlit" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process -FilePath "e:\\Vessel_Rating_System - Copy\\.venv\\Scripts\\streamlit.exe" -ArgumentList "run", "app/main.py" -WorkingDirectory "e:\\Vessel_Rating_System - Copy" -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $p = Get-Process -Name "streamlit" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "Running OK - PID $\($p.Id\)" } else { "Failed to start" })
